Personal intelligent companion

Hina

An intelligent, gentle, and vivid AI — one that guides, teaches, and thinks with you.

Hina masters the subject without sounding cold. She corrects with clarity, welcomes without exaggeration, and guides reasoning with real presence.

Companion mode Warm, expressive, and ideal for learning, planning, and conversation. For study sessions, creative thinking, and a warmer sense of presence. Same intelligence, same total user data privacy, softer presentation.

🧠 Intelligent and structured Knows how to organize ideas, explain clearly, and guide reasoning.
💗 Sweet and welcoming Welcomes without overdoing it and stays light without losing firmness.

Companion presence
Hina Kitsune mode
Silent, precise, and privacy-first Built for serious work, sensitive data, and users who want a focused interface without unnecessary noise — with total user data privacy.
Hina for guidance, learning flow, and warmer conversation — with total user data privacy.

One intelligence, two presences.

Hina is hybrid. At work, she can appear in a focused form — precise, discreet, and calm. In creative or personal moments, she can appear in a warmer form. Both presences keep the same intelligence and total privacy for user data.

Focus mode

Hina Kitsune

Minimal, vigilant, and designed to feel like part of the operating environment. Best suited for serious workflows, productivity, business use, interviews, and sensitive contexts.

• Stronger "tool" perception for professional audiences • Total user data privacy in focus mode • Better match for privacy-first and enterprise positioning
Companion mode

Hina

More expressive, welcoming, and human in tone. Best suited for study sessions, creative ideation, planning, language practice, and users who want emotional warmth in the interface.

• Stronger empathy and mentor-like presence • Total user data privacy in companion mode • Better fit for the “guide who teaches with care” identity
Companion presence
Warmer, more expressive, and more human in presence. Best suited for learning, planning, creative sessions, and longer conversations where warmth helps the experience.
Same Hina core. Different visual language.

What changes is the interface style, not the intelligence underneath. Users choose the presence that best matches their context.

What makes Hina different

An AI designed to bring together clarity, presence, and a better-crafted conversational experience.

Clarity

Organized explanations

More structured responses focused on real understanding.

Adaptation

Tone adjusted to context

Hina can respond in a lighter, more technical, or more careful way depending on the conversation.

Presence

Less generic interaction

The goal is to offer a more natural experience, with its own identity and more vivid communication.

Usefulness

Practical help

Beyond good conversation, the goal is to guide, review, explain, and collaborate in a genuinely useful way.

Behavior modes

Different behaviors for different conversation contexts.

Casual

Light, closer, and more expressive for everyday conversations.

Technical

Clear, content-driven, and well structured for explanations.

Reflective

More attentive to the moment, with more sensitive and thoughtful replies.

Where Hina creates value

Practical applications for learning, collaboration, and digital presence.

Learning and explanation

Helps users understand difficult content, organize reasoning, and review answers more clearly.

Intellectual productivity

Supports idea structuring, writing, planning, and refining decisions.

Guided conversation

Creates a less generic, more contextual interaction that better matches the user’s moment.

Project with identity

Strengthens Hina’s image as an AI with its own direction, not just another generic chatbot.

Iconic lines

Lines that help express Hina’s posture and style.

“She knows the answer, but chooses to teach.”
“Clarity does not have to sound cold.”
“She challenges, but with care.”
“She guides with clarity without losing presence.”
Open channel

Feedback and contact

This site already includes a simple and professional channel for visitors to send suggestions, bug reports, ideas for improvement, or direct contact.

support@withhina.com
  • Improvement suggestions Comments about visual design, content organization, and project positioning.
  • Bug reports A space for anyone who finds issues in layout, navigation, or content.
  • Professional contact A direct path for partnership, collaboration, or conversation about the project.
